Desk Suite Engine Heritage Support ♥
CDP WASM SUITE
CDP-WASM-SUITE
A unique sound transformation toolkit,
compiled to run anywhere.
The legendary CDP — hundreds of esoteric spectral, granular and waveset programs for offline audio processing — ported to run in node.js, as a plug-in, in Ableton Live and in the browser with a retro node graph interface. Integrates the Faust compiler, for custom DSP development.
Try it in your browser Download the App / Plug-in ▸ Download the Ableton Extension ▸
VST3 • AU • CLAP • APP • ABLETON EXTENSION • WEB
vocal_take_03.wav0:04.812
$ pick a process — this scope is live
chord_sus.ana0:04.812
$ pvoc anal — spectral scope is live
SCREENSHOTS
Open the app ↗
● “Spectral freeze-stretch” — a chord PVOC-stretched ×4 • theme Mono (CRT) • font Modern mono 5 themes • 3 fonts • Tab cycles views in-app
A SUITE OF APPS BUILT USING CDP-WASM
PLUG-IN
Composer’s Desktop Plug-in
VST3 AU CLAP APP
A MIDI instrument, not an insert effect. Build a CDP patch from 130+ curated effects, render it, then play the result back polyphonically across the keyboard — in your DAW or standalone.
Download ▸
ABLETON EXTENSION
Composer’s Desktop Extension
ABLETON LIVE
A native Ableton Live extension — the same modular patcher and CDP transformations, wired straight into Live’s workflow.
Download ▸
WEB APP
CDP for Web
BROWSER NO INSTALL
Drop in a sound or generate one, wire up CDP transforms on a modular canvas.
Launch ▸
THE ENGINE & AGENTIC CONTROL
Built on CDP WASM
Each CDP program is a .wasm module loaded by a portable engine. WASM is platform agnostic and works in the browser and with node.js and compatible javascript runtimes. WASM versions of the CDP processes are ideal for agentic sound design using e.g. claude code, since they can run anywhere.
View source ↗ npm install cdp-wasm ↗
$ node transform.js
It runs in Node.js too — script CDP processes from JavaScript and batch-process whole folders of sound, no browser required.
WEBASSEMBLY
CDP HISTORY
Since the late 1980s, the Composers Desktop Project has been the deep end of digital sound transformation — hundreds of processes for spectral manipulation, granulation, time-stretching, waveset distortion, built by composers for the hardware of the time — starting in 1986 with the Atari ST — and quietly refined ever since. CDP has been developed over many years by many different people.
composersdesktop.com ↗
SPEC SHEET
origin  : 1987, York UK
authors : Lots
cdp-wasm: Oli Larkin
programs: 200+

SUPPORT
How to support this project
The plugin built on the CDP WASM Suite is my entry in the KVR Developer Challenge 2026. If you think this is cool, your vote would mean a lot!
You can also sponsor ongoing development on Patreon. Thank you! ♥
Vote on KVR ★ Sponsor on Patreon ♥
